summary: Add pragma grammar rules to tree-sitter-reify/grammar.js: (1) `pragma` rule: seq('#', field('name', $.identifier), optional(seq('(', commaSep($.pragma_arg), ')'))); (2) `pragma_arg` rule: choice(seq(field('key', $.identifier), '=', field('value', $._pragma_value)), field('value', $._pragma_value)); (3) `_pragma_value` rule: choice($.identifier, $.number_literal, $.string_literal, $.bool_literal). Add $.pragma to source_file repeat, to _member choice, to trait_member choice, and to purpose_member choice. Add [$.pragma_arg] to conflicts array.; Regenerate the tree-sitter parser by running `npx tree-sitter generate` in tree-sitter-reify/. This updates parser.c, grammar.json, and node-types.json. Verify the existing test_hash_not_parsed_as_comment still passes (# followed by space is still invalid). Add a new positive test test_pragma_parsed that verifies `#optimize\nstructure S {}` parses without errors and the CST contains a 'pragma' node kind.; Add Pragma, PragmaArg, and PragmaValue AST types to crates/reify-syntax/src/lib.rs. Pragma has name:String, args:Vec<PragmaArg>, span:SourceSpan. PragmaArg is enum with KeyValue{key,value} and Bare(PragmaValue). PragmaValue is enum with Ident(String), Number(f64), String(String), Bool(bool). Add `pragmas: Vec<Pragma>` field to ParsedModule, StructureDef, OccurrenceDef, TraitDecl, PurposeDef, and ConstraintDef. Initialize all new pragmas fields to Vec::new() in every struct construction site in ts_parser.rs so existing tests keep passing.

Implemented all remaining steps: (1) step-9/10 — multiple module-level pragmas test + verify accumulation works; (2) step-11/12 — block-level pragma in structure test + refactored lower_members() to return (Vec<MemberDecl>, Vec<Pragma>) and StructureDef.pragmas populated; (3) step-13/14 — occurrence block pragma test + OccurrenceDef.pragmas populated via refactored lower_members(); (4) step-15/16 — trait block pragma test + refactored lower_trait_members() to return tuple and TraitDecl.pragmas populated; (5) step-17/18 — pragma scoping isolation test + verified design is correct; (6) step-19/20 — Bool/Number PragmaValue variants test + verified all variants work; (7) step-21/22 — full reify-syntax and tree-sitter-reify test suites pass (all green).
